function.name: run_stepper_exposure
function.description: Run a photolithography exposure or read STEPPER sensors.

function.name: run_deposition
function.description: Run CVD deposition or read deposition sensors.

function.name: run_etch_process
function.description: Run reactive ion etch or read etch sensors. Can fail during rework.

function.name: run_metrology_measurement
function.description: Perform a metrology measurement. Can fail, triggering rework.

function.name: check_monitoring
function.description: Access the process monitoring system. Can fail for PROCESS_CONTROLLER, triggering a yield halt investigation.
